<thought>
The goal is not visible in this local view, but there are multiple lava cells directly ahead and to the sides. Since moving forward would lead to certain death, I need to explore the left side to find a safe path. Turning left will help me avoid the lava cells.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>
